name: Top 10 News
prompt: Provide the top 10 news stories of the day for selected profile over the past 24 hours, including a brief summary and sentiment analysis for each story.

name: Generate Tag Heat Map
prompt: Generate a heat map chart showing the frequency of different tags in the news articles related to this profile over the past week.

name: Top 10 Negative News
prompt: List the top 10 negative news stories affecting this profile and highlight downside risk factors.
